title: Not Only Stone
description: A mod that allows you to process glass and wood on a stonecutter!
body:
Have you ever wondered why the saw on a stonecutter can cut through tough materials like stone or deep slate, but can’t handle wood?
The answer is hidden right in the name — yet it still feels unfair.

**Not Only Stone** fixes this injustice by turning the stonecutter into a _woodcutter_ and a _glasscutter_, allowing you to craft complex recipes that normally require a crafting table (such as stairs, slabs, and glass panes) directly on the stonecutter — just in case you don’t have the right workstation at hand.



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Also available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/notonlystone)

</details>
